title: cutting
description: a collection of QoL datapacks that add new recipes to the stonecutter
body:
**warning: do not just hit download go to the versions tab and choose the appropriate pack for your purposes**

This is a collection of cutting datapacks, each of these add a selection of recipes to the stonecutter, this includes
- deepcutting - based on bonefuls datapack but is updated for versions past 1.21.1 this includes recipes for turning normal deepslate to any of the deepslate variants as well as to cobbled deepslate in the stonecutter which can be turned back using the furnace
- woodcutting - adds the ability to turn any log, wood or plank block into any of the other wood blocks (stairs, slabs, fences, etc) for that wood type
- arrowcutting - turn any tipped or spectral arrow into a normal arrow in a stonecutter

**more coming soon**
